action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy 80.32% from iter 4. No TTA gave 80.02%, heavy TTA gave 78.28%. The original best likely used simple hflip TTA. Analysis: hflip TTA is the most conservative and standard - it should help slightly without introducing distribution shift. Time is very limited (~8.5 min). Decision: Add just horizontal flip TTA to predict.py and submit eval with best.pt.
